prompt: Create a transparent pixel art sprite sheet for a street soccer game. Same male football player in all frames, facing right, crisp readable silhouette, clean Mexican neighborhood street football vibe, no text. Arrange exactly in a 5 columns by 2 rows grid with even spacing. Frames, left to right top row: idle, run contact, run passing, sprint contact, sprint passing. Bottom row: slide tackle, goalkeeper dive, knocked down on turf, goal celebration, defeated pose. Transparent background. Strong outline, limited palette, professional 16-bit style, game-ready sprite sheet.
style: clean pixel art sprite sheet for a 2D sports game
composition: full sprite sheet, centered frames, equal grid cells, right-facing character
lighting: neutral studio lighting for game asset readability
constraints: transparent background, no text, no watermark, exact 5x2 sheet layout, one consistent character design across all frames

prompt: Create a transparent pixel art sprite sheet for a soccer ball in a 2D game. Arrange exactly in a single horizontal row of 5 evenly spaced frames. Frames should show readable rotation and one bounce/highlight frame for aerial motion. Clean retro sports-game style, black and white classic ball, no text.
style: clean pixel art sprite sheet for a 2D sports game
composition: single horizontal row, five frames, centered, equal spacing
constraints: transparent background, no text, no watermark, exact 5-frame row, game-ready readability

prompt: Create a transparent pixel art prop sheet for a street soccer game. Arrange exactly in a single horizontal row with 3 props, evenly spaced. Prop 1: glowing turbo pickup icon. Prop 2: hydration station crate with water bottles. Prop 3: sideline bench module. Clean 16-bit neighborhood football aesthetic, no text, no watermark, game-ready readability.
style: clean pixel art prop sheet for a 2D sports game
composition: single horizontal row of three props with equal spacing
constraints: transparent background, no text, no watermark, exact 3-prop row

prompt: Create a wide pixel art backdrop for a street football game menu and scene dressing. Show urban neighborhood stands, walls with mural energy, fencing, lights, and a dramatic cancha atmosphere. No readable text, no logos. Designed as a reusable wide background panel for a 1280x720 2D game, crisp clean pixel art, high production quality.
style: clean pixel art environment art for a 2D sports game
composition: wide backdrop panel with playable-space-friendly center area and rich side detail
lighting: golden-hour stadium glow mixed with urban night lights
constraints: no text, no watermark, game-friendly wide composition

prompt: Create a pixel art UI panel pack for a street soccer game. Include a polished scoreboard card, a dramatic goal/event card, and a menu hero panel in one clean sprite sheet. Arrange them in a tidy layout with separation between panels. No readable text inside the panels. Warm sporty palette, glossy but pixel-art clean, game UI ready.
style: clean pixel art game UI sprite sheet

constraints: no readable text, no watermark, clean reusable UI panels only
